context.goal: Validate that wave_out toggles with period proportional to freq input.
stimulus_intent: Drive a representative legal input pattern across known non-control inputs: ['freq']
Apply a nominal freq value (e.g., 8) and observe wave_out behavior.
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.
Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.
Allow observation window of at least 2*freq clock cycles to capture a toggle.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Exercise boundary-value and width-sensitive input patterns.
stimulus_intent: Use zero-like, one-like, and boundary patterns on ['freq']
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.
Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.

context.goal: Observe repeated or back-to-back legal operations under conservative timing assumptions.
stimulus_intent: Apply two legal operations with minimal idle spacing that remains safe for the current contract strength.
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.
Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.

context.goal: Observe behavior when freq is set to zero, ensuring no spurious toggles or simulation errors.
timing_assumptions: Observe over multiple clock cycles to detect any unexpected toggles.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.

context.goal: Validate that wave_out adapts to a new freq value mid-operation.
stimulus_intent: Start with freq=4, after several toggles switch to freq=8
timing_assumptions: Allow observation window covering both periods.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Apply two different freq values back-to-back with minimal idle cycles.
stimulus_intent: Drive freq=3 for a few cycles, then immediately drive freq=5
timing_assumptions: Observe after each change for at least 2*new_freq cycles.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.

unresolved_items: Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: When count reaches (freq - 1), the count is reset to 0 and wave_out is toggled (i.e., flipped from 0 to 1 or from 1 to 0).

fill_warnings: Experimental TODO fill metadata is present, but the default mainline pipeline remains render -> run -> triage.

generated_files.description: Marks the rendered cocotb test directory as a Python package.
Conservative DUT interface helpers derived from the contract artifact.
Thin environment wrapper that composes interface, timing-safe waits, and coverage helpers.
Structured oracle helper functions rendered from the oracle artifact.
Stable runtime helpers exposed to LLM-filled stimulus and oracle TODO blocks.
Coverage scaffold rendered from plan coverage tags for later execution stages.
Rendered basic cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Rendered edge cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Phase 4 executable Makefile shell; Phase 5 injects run-time variables and executes it.

unresolved_items: Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: When count reaches (freq - 1), the count is reset to 0 and wave_out is toggled (i.e., flipped from 0 to 1 or from 1 to 0).

unresolved_items: Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: When count reaches (freq - 1), the count is reset to 0 and wave_out is toggled (i.e., flipped from 0 to 1 or from 1 to 0).

render_warnings: Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: When count reaches (freq - 1), the count is reset to 0 and wave_out is toggled (i.e., flipped from 0 to 1 or from 1 to 0).
Some rendered cases were downgraded to deferred execution because deterministic stimulus was not available: negative_001, metamorphic_001
Rendered Makefile is an executable Phase 4 shell; Phase 5 injects execution variables and selects the backend.
Task description was provided to the render stage but not used to invent new testbench semantics.
Spec text was provided to the render stage but only upstream artifacts were trusted for code generation.
Deterministic render remains the default mainline; post-render TODO fill is experimental and not required by the benchmark path.
